narrative:
Washington Twp township has 1,198 registered voters, with 57.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.4%, a clear Republican lean of 9.3 percentage points.
